message:
feat(fwc): add CUAL search/batch/MCP/pipeline benchmarks (+14 tests)

Add 6 new benchmark functions covering search index build, search query
latency, batch throughput, MCP tool list/route, and pipeline setup.
4 new BenchCommand variants with dispatch wiring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
